product.shipping1: We dispatch orders within 24 hours on business days. Delivery within Slovakia usually takes 1–3 business days.
product.shipping2: If a product does not suit you, you may return it within 30 days of receipt under our terms and conditions.
product.shipping3: More about shipping, payment and returns is in the Shipping & payment section.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
faq.delivery.a: We usually dispatch orders within 24 hours. Standard delivery within Slovakia is 1 to 3 business days.
faq.pickup.q: Can I pick up my order in person?
faq.pickup.a: We do not currently offer in-person pickup at our office. We offer a wide network of Packeta pickup points.
faq.vegan.q: Are your supplements suitable for vegans?
faq.vegan.a: Most of our products are plant-based and suitable for vegans. Check the composition of each product for details.
faq.claim.q: How do I report damaged goods?
faq.claim.a: If your order arrived damaged, please take photos and send them to info@growmedica.cz. We will resolve it as soon as possible by sending a replacement.
faq.contactPrompt: Didn't find an answer to your question?
